name: MedGemma-4B-it
description: Medical domain expert based on Gemma. Specialized for clinical reasoning, medical question answering, diagnosis support, and patient education. Trained on medical literature and clinical data.
author: Google
sample_inputs: What are the symptoms of diabetes?
Explain the mechanism of action of metformin
What drug interactions should I be aware of with warfarin?
What could cause sudden chest pain and shortness of breath?
sample_outputs: Common symptoms of diabetes include increased thirst, frequent urination, fatigue, blurred vision, and slow wound healing...
Metformin works primarily by reducing hepatic glucose production and improving insulin sensitivity in peripheral tissues...
